title: Reports: Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 Testing, Screening, Tracing and Data Management - Canada.ca
content:
## Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 Testing, Screening, Tracing and Data Management: Reports
Reports developed by the Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 Testing, Screening, Tracing and Data Management provided advice to the federal government on testing, screening, contact tracing, and data.
The Roundtable is no longer active. However, the federal government continues to engage and consult with industry leaders on the best approaches to managing COVID-19.
- Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 testing: Taking stock and looking forward
- Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 testing: Border measures
- Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 report: Accelerating Rapid Screening in the Workplace
- Industry Advisory Roundtable on COVID-19 testing: Task Shifting and Self-Administration for Workplace Screening Programs
